race.comment: PRIDE OF JENNI (9) had a light Autumn Carnival so comes north. Awesome in defeat in the Australian Cup then might have been a bit flat back to a mile a fortnight later in the Queen Of The Turf. This distance looks a perfect fit - expecting her to run them into the ground. SHE'S A HUSTLER (10) has the X-factor. Returned from a spell and was brave in defeat in the Queen Of The Turf. The winner of two from two at this trip and two from two on soft ground. Progressive mare with more upside than most of these. HALF YOURS (1) had his first run since winning the Cups double in the 1400m All Aged and was spotted hitting the line late. Blossomed up here last year and looks set to make his mark again. MISS JOELENE (11) isn't as good as the ones at the top of the market but her wet form is outstanding - as such she is worth including in exotics. BIRDMAN (3) has been freshened up since tiring in the Australian Cup. This distance looks ideal at this stage.
